title: zinnia citrea
intro: Zinnia citrea, also known as the Mexican zinnia, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zinnia citrea include treating fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Zinnia citrea include making teas and infusions from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
